name: Nothing But Cables*
description:
Three-day cable-focused program with some dumbbell and machine work on lower body days. Joint-friendly, great pump. Works standalone 3x/week or as a complement to any other program.

*We tried making it literally "Nothing But Cables", but it's tough to get a good lower-body workout with just cables.

weeks.description: Getting started with lower intensity (more reps in reserve).

exercises.name: Lat Pull-Around
exercises.notes: Set up so you're pulling the cable across your body. Start with a light stretch in your lats. Pull so that elbow and fist are aligned with the cable's motion as you extend and squeeze the shoulder.

exercises.name: Face Pull
exercises.notes: Pull to forehead height, externally rotate at the top. Pause briefly.

exercises.name: Face Pull
exercises.notes: Pull to forehead height, externally rotate at the top. Pause briefly.
